summary: Comprehensive testing of Drop-Ship Purchase Order workflow (iteration_84). Backend: 15/15 tests passed. All drop-ship PO draft generation, vendor shipment capture, BC response handling, and invoice closeout flows working correctly. Frontend: All drop-ship UI elements verified - order type selector, teal summary strip, Generate Drop-Ship PO button, PO draft form, Record Vendor Shipment button, vendor shipment form, linked PO drafts list, vendor shipment logs, and invoice section. Regression tests from iteration_83 also pass (reconcile rejects drop_ship).

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, no functional impact

passed_tests: Backend: POST /generate-drop-ship-po-draft creates PO with po_type=drop_ship and sales_order_id link
Backend: generate-drop-ship-po-draft rejects warehouse SO with 422
Backend: GET /drop-ship-po-drafts lists linked DS PO drafts
Backend: Drop-ship PO draft excluded from incoming supply conversion (POST create-incoming-supply returns 422)
Backend: PATCH /bc-response works for drop_ship draft (captures bc_po_number, bc_response_status) but does NOT create incoming supply
Backend: POST /drop-ship-vendor-shipment records vendor shipment
Backend: drop-ship-vendor-shipment rejects warehouse SO with 422
Backend: drop-ship-vendor-shipment validates linked PO draft if provided
Backend: GET /drop-ship-vendor-shipment-log lists vendor shipment logs
Backend: POST bc-invoice for drop-ship SO succeeds after vendor shipment (no commitment checks)
Backend: POST bc-invoice for drop-ship SO without shipment fails with 422

Backend: GET summary for drop-ship SO shows enriched fields (linked_drop_ship_po_draft_count, linked_drop_ship_po_draft_id, latest_drop_ship_po_status, latest_vendor_shipment_number, latest_vendor_shipped_at)
Backend: summary operational_status reflects ds workflow stages: pending -> po_drafted -> shipped -> complete
Backend: POST reconcile-sales-order for drop_ship still returns 422 (iteration_83 regression)
Backend: Warehouse PO draft still works normally (po_type=warehouse_supply)
Frontend: ShipmentCaptureDialog for drop-ship SO shows 'Drop-Ship' in order type selector
Frontend: Order type badge shows 'No inventory impact' for drop-ship
Frontend: Teal drop-ship summary strip displays PO, PO Status, Vendor Ship, BC Ship, Invoice, operational_status
Frontend: Generate Drop-Ship PO button visible in DROP-SHIP PO DRAFTS section
Frontend: Generate DS PO form with item/qty/description lines, vendor name, notes fields
Frontend: Linked PO drafts list appears showing draft ID, status, vendor, line count
Frontend: Record Vendor Shipment button appears in VENDOR SHIPMENT section for drop-ship
Frontend: Vendor shipment form with item/qty lines, vendor shipment #, linked PO draft select
Frontend: Vendor shipment log appears after recording
Frontend: SHIPMENT HISTORY shows 'drop-ship' badges for drop-ship shipments
Frontend: Invoice section shows 'Fulfillment Complete' message after vendor shipment for drop-ship
Frontend: INVOICE HISTORY shows invoice entries
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2378-2444: Drop-ship PO draft generation - creates PO with po_type=drop_ship and sales_order_id link
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2447-2455: GET /drop-ship-po-drafts lists PO drafts linked by sales_order_id and po_type=drop_ship
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1571-1572: Drop-ship PO drafts gated from incoming supply conversion (po_type=drop_ship returns 422)
Backend inventory_ledger.py Line 1198: BC response skips incoming supply linkage for drop_ship drafts
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2476-2536: Drop-ship vendor shipment endpoint - validates order type and linked PO draft
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2538-2546: Drop-ship vendor shipment log endpoint
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2701-2706: BC invoice for drop_ship checks vendor shipment logs in addition to BC shipment logs
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2788-2845: Summary endpoint enrichment with DS PO draft and vendor shipment fields
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 727-1200: ShipmentCaptureDialog with complete drop-ship PO and vendor shipment UI sections

seed_data_used.drop_ship_so: SO-TEST-DROP-001 (existing drop-ship with PO draft PO-DS-20260314201055-FD1734, vendor shipment VSH-8821, invoices, operational_status=complete)
seed_data_used.test_so_ids: SO-DS-TEST-* (dynamically created for each test run)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Drop-Ship PO workflow fully implemented and tested in iteration_84. Key endpoints: POST /sales-orders/{id}/generate-drop-ship-po-draft, GET /sales-orders/{id}/drop-ship-po-drafts, POST /sales-orders/{id}/drop-ship-vendor-shipment, GET /sales-orders/{id}/drop-ship-vendor-shipment-log. Existing iteration_83 order type awareness tests still pass. PO drafts now have po_type field (warehouse_supply or drop_ship) and optional sales_order_id. Drop-ship drafts are excluded from incoming supply conversion. BC response for drop_ship drafts captures bc_po_number but doesn't create incoming supply. Summary endpoint enriched with DS PO draft count/id/status and vendor shipment number/timestamp. Operational status progression for drop-ship: pending -> po_drafted -> shipped -> complete.

drop_ship_vendor_shipment.validation: Rejects warehouse orders, validates linked PO draft

bc_invoice_for_drop_ship.behavior: Requires BC shipment OR vendor shipment, no commitment checks

po_list.shows: linked PO drafts with status, vendor, lines
